title: Marc Andreessen on Evaluating Founders and AI's Consumer Surplus
content: Marc Andreessen argues that investors should focus on a founder’s IQ, courage, and drive rather than past mistakes or just the business plan. He believes venture capital should back people, not concepts, and explains how AI is increasingly centering the tech industry in Silicon Valley. Andreessen discusses consumer surplus, noting most AI value will capture 99% for a few entities, and challenges the narrative that AI will displace labor.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Marc Andreessen, Harry Stebbings)

normalizedTitle: marc andreessen on evaluating founders and ai s consumer surplus

title: 为何食品价格暂时未受油价和化肥价格冲击的影响
content: Food prices have not yet reacted to rising oil and fertilizer costs because existing supply chains and inventories buffer short‑term shocks. Existing stocks of raw materials and a relatively stable agricultural output keep market prices steady, while the impact of higher input costs has yet to pass through to consumers. Thus, for now, the price increase in oil and fertilizers has not translated into higher food prices.
eventKey: 为何食品价格暂时未受油价和化肥价格冲击的影响
normalizedTitle: 为何食品价格暂时未受油价和化肥价格冲击的影响

title: 稳定用了一周的 Claude Code，分享下我的解决方案~
content: Using Claude Code reliably requires matching IP, browser settings, and payment method. A clean home‑wide, U.S. IP is essential; use tools like ippure.com and disable WebRTC. Global traffic must route through a proxy that covers DNS and system connections—clash with tun + system proxy is recommended. The author built a VPS‑based transparent proxy (cloud‑cli‑proxy) where each Docker container acts as a remote Linux host with SSH or VNC access for users. The open‑source project includes a React admin panel for managing accounts, IP exits, and testing connectivity.
eventKey: 稳定用了一周的-claude-code-分享下我的解决方案
normalizedTitle: 稳定用了一周的 claude code 分享下我的解决方案

title: [开源] 我的微信 Bot 现在能操控飞书文档、生成二维码、搜 Github、导航高德地图了——20+ App 全部一键装
content: OpeniLink Hub, a self‑hosted WeChat iLink message‑management platform, has expanded to over 20 apps in a recent update. It allows natural‑language control of Feishu (covering calendar, documents, tables, tasks, contacts, mail, knowledge base, video calls, messaging) and adds a built‑in MCP Server for AI agents to access WeChat. New apps include maps, weather, currency, QR codes, GitHub, Discord, Slack, Google Workspace, Notion, and more, many in beta. All components are open‑source (MIT), locally stored, and end‑to‑end encrypted.

title: 伊朗局势的冲击正不可避免地波及到超市货架
content: Iranian political turmoil is affecting everyday life, with rising costs and shortages regularly appearing on supermarket shelves. The unrest has led to inflation and supply chain disruptions, forcing consumers to deal with higher prices for food and household items. The situation highlights how regional instability can quickly translate into tangible economic pressures for ordinary people.

title: 微软确认正在大幅改进 Windows 11 搜索功能
content: 微软 Windows 团队证实，针对 Windows 搜索功能的一系列重大改进正在开发当中，目标是解决长期以来搜索结果缓慢、本地文件难以命中、网络推荐过多等问题，让搜索体验变得更简单、更少干扰。这一轮调整由负责 Windows Shell 的产品负责人 Tali Roth 领衔，她在社交平台上多次回应用户质疑，表示搜索将“更简单、更不分散注意力”，并强调微软已经意识到 Windows 目前在搜索、资源管理器、系统行为等方面偏离了用户期待。 此前，微软刚刚对外宣称要“修好 Windows 11”，承诺提高性能和可靠性，包括更快的文件资源管理器…
eventKey: 微软确认正在大幅改进-windows-搜索功能

title: 10万美元的社会保障金太多了
content: The article discusses concerns that a $100,000 annual Social Security benefit is excessive, raising questions about sustainability, fairness, and the impact on both retirees and the overall pension system. It examines the economic implications and policy challenges associated with such high payouts.

title: 第三方 Skill 安全检查工具
content: The “skill-security-check” tool automatically performs a safety pre‑check for any Claude Skill before execution, flagging potentially dangerous skills. A GitHub report shows the tool’s own audit identifies a medium risk due to its `allowed-tools` list including Bash, which allows command execution. However, no dynamic injection or harmful commands were found; flagged strings were only in documentation, resulting in false positives. The tool is considered safe, recommended to run only manually with `disable-model-invocation` enabled.
eventKey: 第三方-skill-安全检查工具
normalizedTitle: 第三方 skill 安全检查工具

title: 为什么企业强制推行人工智能行不通
content: Corporate AI mandates fail because they ignore the diverse, context‑specific needs of different departments and employees. Rushing deployment leads to poor data quality, lack of skill alignment, and low adoption. The resulting tools often deliver limited value, erode trust, and strain resources, turning AI projects into costly experiments rather than organizational assets. A more flexible, incremental approach that prioritizes use cases, people, and data readiness is essential for sustainable AI success.
eventKey: 为什么企业强制推行人工智能行不通
normalizedTitle: 为什么企业强制推行人工智能行不通

title: 🔥 SolonCode v2026.4.1 发布（比 ClaudeCode 简约的编程智能体）
content:
1、关于 SolonCode（编程终端智能体） SolonCode 是基于 Java + Solon AI 开发的 “Claude Code” 国产开源实现版本。

常见问题：它和 Claude Code、OpenCode 有什么不同？

功能上很相似，关键差异：

采用 Java 实现，100% 开源。
使用“全中文”提示词构建。
不绑定特定提供商。需要配置模型。模型迭代会缩小差异、降低成本，因此保持 provider-agnostic 很重要。
聚焦终端命令行界面 (CLI)，通过系统命令运行。
支持 Web，ACP 协议进行远程通讯。…

title: 超越谷歌Tesseract OCR！PaddleOCR登顶GitHub Star全球第一
content:
近日，百度文心衍生模型PaddleOCR在GitHub上的Star数突破73.3K，首次超越谷歌旗下开源OCR标杆产品Tesseract OCR（73.2K），成为全球Star数最高的OCR项目。 ﻿Tesseract OCR诞生于1985年，最初由惠普实验室研发，2005年开源后由Google接手维护并持续迭代，是OCR领域延续近四十年的技术标杆，长期位居GitHub OCR项目Star数榜首。此次被PaddleOCR超越，标志着这一标杆正在被新一代技术体系改写，也是大模型驱动下中国开源项目首次在OCR领域超越谷歌主导的标杆产品。

﻿

title: 韩国政府明年财政政策规模或达 800 万亿韩元，推动跻身全球三大 AI 强国
content:
韩联社消息称，韩国政府周一表示，2027 年将推行扩张性财政政策，以加速以人工智能（AI）为中心的重大转型，支出可能接近800万亿韩元（5290亿美元）。 据韩国规划和预算部称，根据当天内阁批准的一系列指导方针，政府还旨在培育新的增长引擎，并更加重视区域发展的财政投入。

根据政府 2025-2029 年财政管理计划，明年的支出设定为 764.4 万亿韩元，比 2026 年的预算 728 万亿韩元增长 5%。若加上政府正在编制的 25 万亿补充预算以及税收收入增长，其明年预算或将逼近 800 万亿韩元。

title: [Pre-Release] 静听本地播放器 v1.6.0 即将发布：全屏播放 UI 极简重构，解决多项交互痛点
content: The upcoming 1.6.0 update of the local player focuses on a minimalist, immersive UI redesign. It revamps the full‑screen playback screen with a stronger background blur, a dynamic progress bar, and customizable square or circular cover art. Layout issues with lyrics, song info, and audio visualizer are fixed, and interactive bugs (such as accidental lyric swipes) are corrected. Additional changes include a slimmer music library, new tab categories, easier metadata refresh, and improved sharing and settings. The update aims to improve usability and visual appeal.

title: 蚂蚁终圆券商梦
content: Ant Group completed a 28.14 bn HKD acquisition of 50.55 % of Hong Kong broker Yao‑Cai Securities on March 30, giving it a full brokerage licence. The deal mirrors the 2015 “internet brokerage” boom that lifted Eastmoney up and raises hopes that Ant can replicate such growth in Hong Kong. However, unlike China’s nascent market, Hong Kong already hosts many licensed brokers, limiting price‑war opportunities. Ant’s long‑term goal is to integrate digital offerings with cross‑border trading and asset management, seeking a new international competitive edge.

title: claude 订阅登录的 claude code，为什么经常会掉登录状态？
content: Users report that after subscribing to Claude, their login state frequently disappears. This occurs because tools such as cc‑switch periodically write to Claude’s configuration file, overwriting login information. As a result, the session resets after each alteration, causing the user to lose access.

title: 报告：AI 驱动的流量正在有效地取代人类
content:
网络安全公司 Human Security 发布的《2026 年人工智能流量与网络威胁基准报告》显示，AI 和机器人已经正式超越了人类用户。 Human Security 的首席执行官 Stu Solomon 向 CNBC 表示，“互联网的整个创建都基于一个非常基本的理念，即电脑屏幕的另一端是一个人，而这种理念正在迅速被取代。机器流量正在有效地取代人类，成为互联网另一端的主要流量形式。”

报告显示，到 2025 年，AI 驱动的流量将增长近三倍；互联网上的自动化流量增长速度将比人类活动快近八倍。根据 Human Security 的定义…

title: i 茅台单季增长1400万用户的三点思考
content: The article explains that iMaotai’s surge of 14 million new users in Q1 of 2026 stems from three factors: it eliminated trust issues by guaranteeing authenticity, it served as a bridge to consumers rather than just a seasonal promotion, and once authenticity was scaled, demand exploded. This shift turned a traditional luxury‑alcohol market with high entry barriers into an accessible platform, driving rapid user and transaction growth.

title: Claude Code之父独家分享：15个最喜欢、但经常被忽略的CC功能 | 原文
content: Claude Code creator Boris Cherny lists 15 frequently used but often overlooked features. Key points include: the mobile iOS/Android app lets users edit code without a computer; a “Code” tab in the app; and seamless switching between phone, web, desktop, and terminal using commands like `claude --teleport…`. These techniques are central to Cherny’s daily workflow.

title: 苹果即将推出全新 iPhone 相机功能？
content: Apple’s upcoming iPhone 18 Pro series is expected to feature a variable‑aperture camera system, a long‑tried but largely abandoned technology in smartphones. While most phones use fixed apertures due to sensor size and overexposure concerns, several manufacturers—including Nokia, Samsung, Huawei, and Xiaomi—have experimented with adjustable f‑stops, with mixed results. Apple’s move may aim to offer better depth control or improve image quality, though its practical benefit remains uncertain.
eventKey: 苹果即将推出全新-iphone-相机功能
normalizedTitle: 苹果即将推出全新 iphone 相机功能

title: 王自如公开招聘全栈前端，要求有多离谱？
content: The article critiques a rumored job posting for a full‑stack front‑end role that lists impossible expectations, from mastering React, Node, Docker, K8S, PostgreSQL, iOS WebView, to constant AI tool usage. The author argues this reflects a trend where employers exploit AI to demand ever‑larger scopes from engineers, eroding job boundaries and overloading individuals. He warns against self‑doubt, stresses that true advancement should enhance work quality, not drain personal dignity, and urges engineers to maintain clear professional limits.

title: GPT 移动端比网页慢很多？
content: Some users report that GPT on mobile devices runs much slower than on the web. They use a standard GPT account and a VPN node (Clash Verge on Windows 11, Clash Meta on Android). During conversations the mobile app lags, often stalling on load. Even after the notification indicates completion, the screen may refresh only after a few seconds or switching the app. Additionally, the mobile interface lacks the paced “thought‑chain” output seen on the web. This appears to be a bug or performance issue specific to the mobile app, not the GPT service itself.

normalizedTitle: gpt 移动端比网页慢很多

title: 今天和 HR 说取消校招，因为上周一个需求让我后背发凉
content: The author, who previously dismissed AI, had a change of heart after an AI model (Claude 4.6 Sonnet) refactored a seven‑year‑old order‑settlement module in 20 minutes, producing Go code, tests, Kubernetes YAML, and identifying concurrency bugs it had not been instructed to find. The AI delivered a full code review that would normally require weeks of human effort, costing only a subscription fee. The author questions whether companies are outsourcing hiring to AI, the future of architecture roles, and how current graduates respond to such shifts.

title: Coding Agents Could Make Free Software Matter Again
content: Coding agents—automated tools that generate program code—could revive the importance of free software by making it easier to create and modify open‑source solutions. By automating routine coding tasks, these agents enable developers to focus on higher‑level design and community collaboration, potentially increasing the quantity and quality of freely available code. This shift may reinvigorate the free‑software ecosystem, encouraging shared innovation and cost‑effective software development.
eventKey: coding-agents-could-make-free-software
normalizedTitle: coding agents could make free software matter again

title: 宇树科技王兴兴：具身智能 GPT 时刻大概还需两到三年
content: In 2026, YuanTree founder and CEO Wang Xingxing spoke at the China Internet Media Forum, titled “When Robots Flood the Scene.” He described the “GPT moment” for embodied AI as a point when robots entering unfamiliar settings can accomplish 80‑90 % of tasks via voice commands. Wang estimates this milestone will still be two to three years away, expecting major technical advances within the next year or two.

title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
content: OpenAI organized a workshop in Asia to help disaster‑response teams apply artificial intelligence to real‑world emergencies. The event, held in partnership with the Gates Foundation, focused on translating AI capabilities into actionable strategies for rapid assessment, resource allocation, and communication during crises. The goal was to equip responders with practical tools and knowledge for deploying AI technologies effectively in disaster scenarios across the region.
